task_extractions.text: High priority: Fix the critical authentication bug in the login service. Users are unable to log in.

expected.title: Fix critical authentication bug in login service

task_extractions.text: We need to implement a new dashboard feature showing user analytics and activity metrics.
Low priority task: Update the API documentation to include the new endpoints we added last sprint.

expected.title: Update API documentation with new endpoints

task_extractions.text: Refactor the database connection pooling logic to improve performance and reduce memory usage.
URGENT: Payment processing is failing for international transactions. This is blocking revenue.

expected.title: Fix payment processing for international transactions

task_extractions.text: Medium priority: Add search functionality to the product catalog with filters for price and category.

expected.title: Add search functionality to product catalog

task_extractions.text: Fix typo in footer text on the homepage. Quick fix, low priority.
Refactor the authentication middleware to use the new JWT library and improve security.

expected.title: Refactor authentication middleware with new JWT library

task_extractions.text: Create comprehensive user guide for the admin dashboard with screenshots and step-by-step instructions.

expected.title: Create user guide for admin dashboard

task_extractions.text: Implement dark mode support across the entire application. Users have been requesting this.
